title: fix(deps): update module github.com/pkg/sftp to v1.13.11
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Change | [Age](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [Confidence](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/pkg/sftp](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp) | `v1.13.10` → `v1.13.11` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fpkg%2fsftp/v1.13.11?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fpkg%2fsftp/v1.13.10/v1.13.11?slim=true) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>pkg/sftp (github.com/pkg/sftp)</summary>

### [`v1.13.11`](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/releases/tag/v1.13.11): - maintenance release

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/compare/v1.13.10...v1.13.11)

This release bounds an unchecked pre-allocation in the SSH\_FILEXFER\_ATTRS decoder, updates dependencies, and includes minor code cleanups.

##### Security/robustness

The attribute decoder (`unmarshalFileStat`) allocated the extended-attribute slice directly from the wire-supplied `extended_count` without bounding it against the available bytes. A peer could advertise a huge `extended_count` in a small packet and force a multi-gigabyte allocation up front, crashing the process with `fatal error: out of memory` before a single entry was parsed.

##### What's Changed

- fix: ineffective assignments by [@​alrs](https://redirect.github.com/alrs) in [#​650](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/pull/650)
- refactor: replace interface{} with any (Go 1.18+) by [@​MD-Mushfiqur123](https://redirect.github.com/MD-Mushfiqur123) in [#​652](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/pull/652)
- fix: bound extended-count pre-allocation in unmarshalFileStat by [@​drakkan](https://redirect.github.com/drakkan) (co-authored by [@​mjbommar](https://redirect.github.com/mjbommar))

##### New Contributors

- [@​alrs](https://redirect.github.com/alrs) made their first contribution in [#​650](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/pull/650)
- [@​MD-Mushfiqur123](https://redirect.github.com/MD-Mushfiqur123) made their first contribution in [#​652](https://redirect.github.com/pkg/sftp/pull/652)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/pkg/sftp/compare/v1.13.10...v1.13.11>

</details>
